card_teaser.title: Marion Deichmann
card_teaser.description: A German Jewish survivor, escaped Nazi-occupied Europe after losing her mother in the Vel d'Hiv roundup and Holocaust, later immigrating to the United States in 1947 before eventually returning to France.
card_teaser.did_you_know_text: At age 9, she was hidden by the French Resistance
